title: anthemis abylaea
intro: Anthemis abylaea, also known as the Aegyptian Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anthemis abylaea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Anthemis abylaea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
